title: Charred, Cheesy Jamaican Mushrooms Wrap
description: A flavorful, vegan-friendly wrap featuring wood ear mushrooms and a shio-koji cure, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of coconut oil and swirl to coat the pan.
Add the onion and scotch bonnet peppers and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the mushrooms and sauté until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the shio-koji cure and stir to combine.
Add the curry powder, smoked paprika, and flour, and stir to combine.
Add the cheddar cheese substitute and stir until melted and bubbly.
Warm the tortilla wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spooning the mushroom mixture onto the center of the tortilla, then folding the bottom half up and rolling the wrap into a tight cylinder.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped scallions if desired.
